sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n84146" key="podiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ποδικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n84146.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of a metrical foot</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">feet,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">γένη, λόγος,</foreign> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2054.tlg001:1:15" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aristid.Quint.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.15</biblScope></bibl>,<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2054.tlg001:19" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">19</biblScope> </bibl>; <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">π. χρόνοι,</foreign> opp. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἁπλοῖ, πολλαπλοῖ,</foreign> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2054.tlg001:14" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">14</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
